clientID.description: If not set, a random client ID is used.

tlsAuth.description: Enables TLS authentication using client cert configured in secure json data.

tlsAuthWithCACert.description: Needed for verifying servers with self-signed TLS Certs.

tlsSkipVerify.description: When enabled, skips verification of the MQTT server's TLS certificate chain and host name.

secureValues.description: If a Certificate Authority certificate is required to verify the server's certificate, provide it here.
To authenticate with an TLS client certificate, provide the client certificate here.
To authenticate with a client TLS certificate, provide the private key here.
